metadata.description: Curated plugin marketplace for shared MCP tools, engineering workflows, productivity automation, and system maintenance.

plugins.description: Shared MCP infrastructure (Tavily, Exa) - install first as dependency for other plugins

plugins.name: p-assist
plugins.description: ⚠️ FOR PERSONAL USE ONLY - Productivity plugin (reference only)

plugins.description: Foundational engineering tools for diagram generation, technical documentation, and development workflows

plugins.name: sys-maint
plugins.description: System maintenance and cleanup utilities for Docker and disk space

plugins.name: thinking-tools
plugins.description: Thinking tools for pressure-testing ideas and sharpening decisions
